name: list_documents
description: List documents in a specific knowledge-base source. Returns file path, title, MIME type, file size, and last modified date for each document.

source_id.description: The source ID to list documents for. Use list_sources to discover available IDs.

limit.description: Maximum number of documents to return (default 50, max 200)

offset.description: Number of documents to skip for pagination (default 0)
